nasb.text: For they provoked Him with their high places And aroused His jealousy with their graven images.

esv.text: For they provoked him to anger with their high places; they moved him to jealousy with their idols.

cnv.text: 因他們的邱壇，惹起他的怒氣， 因他們雕刻的偶像，激起他的憤恨。

ccb.text: 他们建造丘坛，惹祂发怒； 他们竖起神像，令祂愤怒。

csbs.text: 他们的高所惹他恼怒， 他们雕刻的偶像激起他的嫉恨。
